steps.title: Find the sorting rate
steps.content: The machine sorts $18$ pounds in $6$ minutes, so its rate is $$\frac{18\text{ pounds}}{6\text{ minutes}}=3\text{ pounds per minute}$$

steps.title: Divide by the rate
steps.content: To find the time for $108$ pounds, divide the total pounds by the rate: $$\frac{108\text{ pounds}}{3\text{ pounds per minute}}=36\text{ minutes}$$ The answer is C.
